description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 84% cotton and 16% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with drawstring, two front pockets, ribbed hem with brand badge and distressed graphic print Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Every style maven's wardrobe must have an off-duty essential like this Levi's sweatshirt that flaunts a distressed brand logo on the front. Pair this sweatshirt with distressed jeans and sneakers to complete your functional-yet-fashionable look this winter. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
